name: Green Tea Extract
description: A potent polyphenol-rich extract that calms and protects the skin.
scientificSummary: The primary polyphenol in green tea, EGCG, has been shown to reduce sebum production and possess anti-microbial properties.
mechanismOfAction: Neutralizes free radicals and inhibits the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines.

seo.title: Green Tea Extract - Antioxidant Skin Protection | Dew Theory
seo.description: Harness the calming and protective benefits of Green Tea for your skin.
